1→package com.pinterest.ktlint.ruleset.standard.rules
  2→
  3→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.ElementType.BLOCK
  4→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.ElementType.ELSE
  5→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.ElementType.ELSE_KEYWORD
  6→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.ElementType.IF
  7→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.ElementType.LBRACE
  8→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.ElementType.RBRACE
  9→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.ElementType.RPAR
 10→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.ElementType.THEN
 11→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.IndentConfig
 12→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.RuleId
 13→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.editorconfig.EditorConfig
 14→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.editorconfig.INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY
 15→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.editorconfig.INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY
 16→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.indent
 17→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.isPartOfComment
 18→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.isWhiteSpace
 19→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.isWhiteSpaceWithoutNewline
 20→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.nextSibling
 21→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe
 22→import com.pinterest.ktlint.ruleset.standard.StandardRule
 23→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.com.intellij.lang.ASTNode
 24→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.com.intellij.psi.impl.source.tree.LeafPsiElement
 25→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.com.intellij.psi.impl.source.tree.PsiWhiteSpaceImpl
 26→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.psi.KtBlockExpression
 27→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.psi.psiUtil.leaves
 28→
 29→/**
 30→ * https://kotlinlang.org/docs/reference/coding-conventions.html#formatting-control-flow-statements
 31→ */
 32→public class MultiLineIfElseRule :
 33→    StandardRule(
 34→        id = "multiline-if-else",
 35→        usesEditorConfigProperties =
 36→            setOf(
 37→                INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY,
 38→                INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY,
 39→            ),
 40→    ) {
 41→    private var indentConfig = IndentConfig.DEFAULT_INDENT_CONFIG
 42→
 43→    override fun beforeFirstNode(editorConfig: EditorConfig) {
 44→        indentConfig = IndentConfig(
 45→            indentStyle = editorConfig[INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY],
 46→            tabWidth = editorConfig[INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY],
 47→        )
 48→    }
 49→
 50→    override fun beforeVisitChildNodes(
 51→        node: ASTNode,
 52→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
 53→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
 54→    ) {
 55→        if (node.elementType == THEN || node.elementType == ELSE) {
 56→            if (node.firstChildNode?.elementType == BLOCK) {
 57→                return
 58→            }
 59→
 60→            if (!node.treePrev.textContains('\n')) {
 61→                if (node.firstChildNode.elementType == IF) {
 62→                    // Allow single line for:
 63→                    // else if (...)
 64→                    return
 65→                }
 66→                if (!node.treeParent.textContains('\n')) {
 67→                    // Allow single line if statements as long as they are really simple (e.g. do not contain newlines)
 68→                    //    if (...) <statement> // no else statement
 69→                    //    if (...) <statement> else <statement>
 70→                    return
 71→                }
 72→            }
 73→
 74→            emit(node.firstChildNode.startOffset, "Missing { ... }", true)
 75→            if (autoCorrect) {
 76→                autocorrect(node)
 77→            }
 78→        }
 79→    }
 80→
 81→    private fun autocorrect(node: ASTNode) {
 82→        val prevLeaves =
 83→            node
 84→                .leaves(forward = false)
 85→                .takeWhile { it.elementType !in listOf(RPAR, ELSE_KEYWORD) }
 86→                .toList()
 87→                .reversed()
 88→        val nextLeaves =
 89→            node
 90→                .leaves(forward = true)
 91→                .takeWhile { it.isWhiteSpaceWithoutNewline() || it.isPartOfComment() }
 92→                .toList()
 93→                .dropLastWhile { it.isWhiteSpaceWithoutNewline() }
 94→
 95→        prevLeaves
 96→            .firstOrNull()
 97→            .takeIf { it.isWhiteSpace() }
 98→            ?.let {
 99→                (it as LeafPsiElement).rawReplaceWithText(" ")
100→            }
101→        KtBlockExpression(null).apply {
102→            val previousChild = node.firstChildNode
103→            node.replaceChild(node.firstChildNode, this)
104→            addChild(LeafPsiElement(LBRACE, "{"))
105→            addChild(PsiWhiteSpaceImpl(node.indent().plus(indentConfig.indent)))
106→            prevLeaves
107→                .dropWhile { it.isWhiteSpace() }
108→                .forEach(::addChild)
109→            addChild(previousChild)
110→            nextLeaves.forEach(::addChild)
111→            addChild(PsiWhiteSpaceImpl(node.indent()))
112→            addChild(LeafPsiElement(RBRACE, "}"))
113→        }
114→
115→        // Make sure else starts on same line as newly inserted right brace
116→        if (node.elementType == THEN) {
117→            node
118→                .nextSibling { !it.isPartOfComment() }
119→                ?.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(" ")
120→        }
121→    }
122→}
123→
124→public val MULTI_LINE_IF_ELSE_RULE_ID: RuleId = MultiLineIfElseRule().ruleId
125→

1→package com.pinterest.ktlint.ruleset.standard.rules
  2→
  3→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.ElementType.BLOCK
  4→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.ElementType.ELSE
  5→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.ElementType.ELSE_KEYWORD
  6→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.ElementType.IF
  7→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.ElementType.IF_KEYWORD
  8→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.ElementType.LBRACE
  9→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.ElementType.RBRACE
 10→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.ElementType.RPAR
 11→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.ElementType.THEN
 12→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.IndentConfig
 13→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.RuleId
 14→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.editorconfig.EditorConfig
 15→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.editorconfig.INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY
 16→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.editorconfig.INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY
 17→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.firstChildLeafOrSelf
 18→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.indent
 19→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.isPartOfComment
 20→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.isWhiteSpace
 21→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.isWhiteSpaceWithoutNewline
 22→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.nextSibling
 23→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe
 24→import com.pinterest.ktlint.ruleset.standard.StandardRule
 25→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.com.intellij.lang.ASTNode
 26→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.com.intellij.psi.impl.source.tree.LeafPsiElement
 27→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.com.intellij.psi.impl.source.tree.PsiWhiteSpaceImpl
 28→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.psi.KtBlockExpression
 29→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.psi.psiUtil.leaves
 30→
 31→/**
 32→ * https://kotlinlang.org/docs/reference/coding-conventions.html#formatting-control-flow-statements
 33→ */
 34→public class MultiLineIfElseRule :
 35→    StandardRule(
 36→        id = "multiline-if-else",
 37→        usesEditorConfigProperties =
 38→            setOf(
 39→                INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY,
 40→                INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY,
 41→            ),
 42→    ) {
 43→    private var indentConfig = IndentConfig.DEFAULT_INDENT_CONFIG
 44→
 45→    override fun beforeFirstNode(editorConfig: EditorConfig) {
 46→        indentConfig = IndentConfig(
 47→            indentStyle = editorConfig[INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY],
 48→            tabWidth = editorConfig[INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY],
 49→        )
 50→    }
 51→
 52→    override fun beforeVisitChildNodes(
 53→        node: ASTNode,
 54→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
 55→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
 56→    ) {
 57→        if (node.elementType == THEN || node.elementType == ELSE) {
 58→            if (node.firstChildNode?.elementType == BLOCK) {
 59→                return
 60→            }
 61→
 62→            if (!node.treePrev.textContains('\n')) {
 63→                if (node.firstChildNode.startsWithIfOrBrace()) {
 64→                    // Allow single line for:
 65→                    // else if (...)
 66→                    // else { ... }.plus(...)
 67→                    return
 68→                }
 69→                if (!node.treeParent.textContains('\n')) {
 70→                    // Allow single line if statements as long as they are really simple (e.g. do not contain newlines)
 71→                    //    if (...) <statement> // no else statement
 72→                    //    if (...) <statement> else <statement>
 73→                    return
 74→                }
 75→            }
 76→
 77→            emit(node.firstChildNode.startOffset, "Missing { ... }", true)
 78→            if (autoCorrect) {
 79→                autocorrect(node)
 80→            }
 81→        }
 82→    }
 83→
 84→    private fun ASTNode?.startsWithIfOrBrace(): Boolean =
 85→        this
 86→            ?.firstChildLeafOrSelf()
 87→            ?.elementType
 88→            .let { it == IF_KEYWORD || it == LBRACE }
 89→
 90→    private fun autocorrect(node: ASTNode) {
 91→        val prevLeaves =
 92→            node
 93→                .leaves(forward = false)
 94→                .takeWhile { it.elementType !in listOf(RPAR, ELSE_KEYWORD) }
 95→                .toList()
 96→                .reversed()
 97→        val nextLeaves =
 98→            node
 99→                .leaves(forward = true)
100→                .takeWhile { it.isWhiteSpaceWithoutNewline() || it.isPartOfComment() }
101→                .toList()
102→                .dropLastWhile { it.isWhiteSpaceWithoutNewline() }
103→
104→        prevLeaves
105→            .firstOrNull()
106→            .takeIf { it.isWhiteSpace() }
107→            ?.let {
108→                (it as LeafPsiElement).rawReplaceWithText(" ")
109→            }
110→        KtBlockExpression(null).apply {
111→            val previousChild = node.firstChildNode
112→            node.replaceChild(node.firstChildNode, this)
113→            addChild(LeafPsiElement(LBRACE, "{"))
114→            addChild(PsiWhiteSpaceImpl(node.indent().plus(indentConfig.indent)))
115→            prevLeaves
116→                .dropWhile { it.isWhiteSpace() }
117→                .forEach(::addChild)
118→            addChild(previousChild)
119→            nextLeaves.forEach(::addChild)
120→            addChild(PsiWhiteSpaceImpl(node.indent()))
121→            addChild(LeafPsiElement(RBRACE, "}"))
122→        }
123→
124→        // Make sure else starts on same line as newly inserted right brace
125→        if (node.elementType == THEN) {
126→            node
127→                .nextSibling { !it.isPartOfComment() }
128→                ?.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(" ")
129→        }
130→    }
131→}
132→
133→public val MULTI_LINE_IF_ELSE_RULE_ID: RuleId = MultiLineIfElseRule().ruleId
134→

content.text:
I have fixed the false positive in `MultiLineIfElseRule` where `else if` was incorrectly being formatted into nested `else { if { ... } }` blocks when used as part of a larger expression (like an elvis operator or a method call on the `if` expression).

The root cause was that the rule only recognized an `else if` if the `ELSE` node's first child was exactly an `IF` node. If the `if` was wrapped in another expression (e.g., `BINARY_EXPRESSION` for elvis or `DOT_QUALIFIED_EXPRESSION` for method calls), the rule failed to recognize it as an `else if` and proceeded to wrap the entire expression in a new `BLOCK`.

I have updated the rule to check if the `else` branch *starts* with an `if` keyword or a left brace (indicating it's already braced at the start, possibly as a block or a lambda). This correctly identifies `else if` even when it is part of a larger expression, and also avoids redundant double-bracing for branches that already start with a block.

Changes:
- Modified `MultiLineIfElseRule.kt` to include a helper `startsWithIfOrBrace()` that checks the first code leaf of a node.
- Updated `beforeVisitChildNodes` to use this helper when determining if a branch should be exempt from mandatory bracing on a multiline `if`.
- Added necessary imports for `IF_KEYWORD`, `LBRACE`, and `firstChildLeafOrSelf`.
- Verified the fix with new test cases and ensured no regressions in existing tests.

```kotlin
    private fun ASTNode?.startsWithIfOrBrace(): Boolean =
        this
            ?.firstChildLeafOrSelf()
            ?.elementType
            .let { it == IF_KEYWORD || it == LBRACE }
```

 12→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.RuleId

 15→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.editorconfig.INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY
 16→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.indent
 17→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.isPartOfComment

 22→import com.pinterest.ktlint.ruleset.standard.StandardRule
 23→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.com.intellij.lang.ASTNode
 24→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.com.intellij.psi.impl.source.tree.LeafPsiElement
 25→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.com.intellij.psi.impl.source.tree.PsiWhiteSpaceImpl
 26→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.psi.KtBlockExpression
 27→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.psi.psiUtil.leaves
 28→
 29→/**
 30→ * https://kotlinlang.org/docs/reference/coding-conventions.html#formatting-control-flow-statements
 31→ */
 32→public class MultiLineIfElseRule :
 33→    StandardRule(
 34→        id = "multiline-if-else",
 35→        usesEditorConfigProperties =
 36→            setOf(
 37→                INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY,
 38→                INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY,
 39→            ),
 40→    ) {
 41→    private var indentConfig = IndentConfig.DEFAULT_INDENT_CONFIG
 42→
 43→    override fun beforeFirstNode(editorConfig: EditorConfig) {
 44→        indentConfig = IndentConfig(
 45→            indentStyle = editorConfig[INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY],
 46→            tabWidth = editorConfig[INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY],
 47→        )
 48→    }
 49→
 50→    override fun beforeVisitChildNodes(
 51→        node: ASTNode,
 52→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
 53→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
 54→    ) {
 55→        if (node.elementType == THEN || node.elementType == ELSE) {
 56→            if (node.firstChildNode?.elementType == BLOCK) {
 57→                return
 58→            }
 59→
 60→            if (!node.treePrev.textContains('\n')) {
 61→                if (node.firstChildNode.elementType == IF) {
 62→                    // Allow single line for:
 63→                    // else if (...)
 64→                    return
 65→                }
 66→                if (!node.treeParent.textContains('\n')) {
 67→                    // Allow single line if statements as long as they are really simple (e.g. do not contain newlines)
 68→                    //    if (...) <statement> // no else statement
 69→                    //    if (...) <statement> else <statement>
 70→                    return
 71→                }
 72→            }
 73→
 74→            emit(node.firstChildNode.startOffset, "Missing { ... }", true)
 75→            if (autoCorrect) {
 76→                autocorrect(node)
 77→            }
 78→        }
 79→    }
 80→
 81→    private fun autocorrect(node: ASTNode) {
 82→        val prevLeaves =
 83→            node
 84→                .leaves(forward = false)
 85→                .takeWhile { it.elementType !in listOf(RPAR, ELSE_KEYWORD) }
 86→                .toList()
 87→                .reversed()
 88→        val nextLeaves =
 89→            node
 90→                .leaves(forward = true)
 91→                .takeWhile { it.isWhiteSpaceWithoutNewline() || it.isPartOfComment() }
 92→                .toList()
 93→                .dropLastWhile { it.isWhiteSpaceWithoutNewline() }
 94→
 95→        prevLeaves
 96→            .firstOrNull()
 97→            .takeIf { it.isWhiteSpace() }
 98→            ?.let {
 99→                (it as LeafPsiElement).rawReplaceWithText(" ")
100→            }
101→        KtBlockExpression(null).apply {
102→            val previousChild = node.firstChildNode
103→            node.replaceChild(node.firstChildNode, this)
104→            addChild(LeafPsiElement(LBRACE, "{"))
105→            addChild(PsiWhiteSpaceImpl(node.indent().plus(indentConfig.indent)))
106→            prevLeaves
107→                .dropWhile { it.isWhiteSpace() }
108→                .forEach(::addChild)
109→            addChild(previousChild)
110→            nextLeaves.forEach(::addChild)
111→            addChild(PsiWhiteSpaceImpl(node.indent()))
112→            addChild(LeafPsiElement(RBRACE, "}"))
113→        }
114→
115→        // Make sure else starts on same line as newly inserted right brace
116→        if (node.elementType == THEN) {
117→            node
118→                .nextSibling { !it.isPartOfComment() }
119→                ?.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(" ")
120→        }
121→    }
122→}
123→
124→public val MULTI_LINE_IF_ELSE_RULE_ID: RuleId = MultiLineIfElseRule().ruleId

 44→
 45→    override fun beforeFirstNode(editorConfig: EditorConfig) {
 46→        indentConfig = IndentConfig(
 47→            indentStyle = editorConfig[INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY],
 48→            tabWidth = editorConfig[INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY],
 49→        )
 50→    }
 51→
 52→    override fun beforeVisitChildNodes(
 53→        node: ASTNode,
 54→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
 55→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
 56→    ) {
 57→        if (node.elementType == THEN || node.elementType == ELSE) {
 58→            if (node.firstChildNode?.elementType == BLOCK) {
 59→                return
 60→            }
 61→
 62→            if (!node.treePrev.textContains('\n')) {
 63→                if (node.firstChildNode.startsWithIfOrBrace()) {
 64→                    // Allow single line for:
 65→                    // else if (...)
 66→                    // else { ... }.plus(...)
 67→                    return
 68→                }
 69→                if (!node.treeParent.textContains('\n')) {
 70→                    // Allow single line if statements as long as they are really simple (e.g. do not contain newlines)
 71→                    //    if (...) <statement> // no else statement
 72→                    //    if (...) <statement> else <statement>
 73→                    return
 74→                }
 75→            }
 76→
 77→            emit(node.firstChildNode.startOffset, "Missing { ... }", true)
 78→            if (autoCorrect) {
 79→                autocorrect(node)
 80→            }
 81→        }
 82→    }
 83→
 84→    private fun ASTNode?.startsWithIfOrBrace(): Boolean =
 85→        this
 86→            ?.firstChildLeafOrSelf()
 87→            ?.elementType
 88→            .let { it == IF_KEYWORD || it == LBRACE }
 89→
 90→    private fun autocorrect(node: ASTNode) {
 91→        val prevLeaves =
 92→            node
 93→                .leaves(forward = false)
 94→                .takeWhile { it.elementType !in listOf(RPAR, ELSE_KEYWORD) }
 95→                .toList()
 96→                .reversed()
 97→        val nextLeaves =
 98→            node
 99→                .leaves(forward = true)
100→                .takeWhile { it.isWhiteSpaceWithoutNewline() || it.isPartOfComment() }
101→                .toList()
102→                .dropLastWhile { it.isWhiteSpaceWithoutNewline() }
103→
104→        prevLeaves
105→            .firstOrNull()
106→            .takeIf { it.isWhiteSpace() }
107→            ?.let {
108→                (it as LeafPsiElement).rawReplaceWithText(" ")
109→            }
110→        KtBlockExpression(null).apply {
111→            val previousChild = node.firstChildNode
112→            node.replaceChild(node.firstChildNode, this)
113→            addChild(LeafPsiElement(LBRACE, "{"))
114→            addChild(PsiWhiteSpaceImpl(node.indent().plus(indentConfig.indent)))
115→            prevLeaves
116→                .dropWhile { it.isWhiteSpace() }
117→                .forEach(::addChild)
118→            addChild(previousChild)
119→            nextLeaves.forEach(::addChild)
120→            addChild(PsiWhiteSpaceImpl(node.indent()))
121→            addChild(LeafPsiElement(RBRACE, "}"))
122→        }
123→
124→        // Make sure else starts on same line as newly inserted right brace
125→        if (node.elementType == THEN) {
126→            node
127→                .nextSibling { !it.isPartOfComment() }
128→                ?.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(" ")
129→        }
130→    }
131→}
132→
133→public val MULTI_LINE_IF_ELSE_RULE_ID: RuleId = MultiLineIfElseRule().ruleId
134→
